inputs.label: Initial Deposit
inputs.businessContext: Amount of money initially deposited into the CD.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of money initially deposited into the CD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevduat hesabına başlangıçta yatırılan para miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geldbetrag, der ursprünglich auf das Festgeldkonto eingezahlt wurde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant d'argent initialement déposé sur le CD.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de dinero depositada inicialmente en el CD.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ المودع أولياً في شهادة الإيداع

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual percentage yield (APY) offered by the CD.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual percentage yield (APY) offered by the CD.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevduat sertifikası tarafından sunulan yıllık yüzde getiri (APY).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement annuel en pourcentage (APY) offert par le CD.
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento porcentual anual (APY) ofrecido por el CD.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العائد السنوي المئوي (APY) المقدم من شهادة الإيداع

inputs.label: Term Length
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the CD in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the CD in months.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik faiz sayısı (örneğin, aylık için 12).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zinseszinsperioden pro Jahr (z. B. 12 für monatlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois que l'intérêt est composé par an (ex. : 12 pour mensuel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que se capitaliza el interés por año (ej., 12 para mensual).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مرات مضاعفة الفائدة سنوياً (مثال: 12 للمركبة شهرياً)

inputs.label: Additional Monthly Deposit
inputs.businessContext: Optional additional deposit made each month.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional additional deposit made each month.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her ay yatırılan isteğe bağlı ek para.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionale zusätzliche Einzahlung, die jeden Monat getätigt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépôt supplémentaire facultatif effectué chaque mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Depósito adicional opcional realizado cada mes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إيداع إضافي اختياري يتم كل شهر
